apy.headline: Past 30 days: {{apy}}% APY*
apy.detailWithRange: Loop pays variable yield based on market conditions. Past 30 days: {{apy}}%. Range over past 90 days: {{min}}% – {{max}}%. Withdraw anytime, funds settle in seconds.
apy.detailNoRange: Loop pays variable yield based on market conditions. Past 30 days: {{apy}}%. Withdraw anytime, funds settle in seconds.
